body_excerpt: In kbase_mem_from_user_buffer of mali_kbase_mem_linux.c, there is a possible remapping of shared read-only memory as write-able due to a missing permission check. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
